en: A PSALM OF DAVID.Hear my prayer, O LORD; give ear to my pleas for mercy! In your faithfulness answer me, in your righteousness!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你聽我的禱告， 留心聽我的懇求， 憑你的信實和公義應允我。

en: Enter not into judgment with your servant, for no one living is righteous before you.
zh: 求你不要審判你的僕人， 因為凡活著的人，在你面前沒有一個是義的。

en: For the enemy has pursued my soul; he has crushed my life to the ground; he has made me sit in darkness like those long dead.
zh: 仇敵逼迫我， 把我壓倒在地， 使我住在黑暗之處， 像死了很久的人一樣。

en: Therefore my spirit faints within me; my heart within me is appalled.
zh: 因此我的靈在我裡面軟弱， 我的心在我裡面戰慄。

en: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all that you have done; I ponder the work of your hands.
zh: 我追念以往的日子， 默想你的一切作為， 沉思你手所作的。

en: I stretch out my hands to you; my soul thirsts for you like a parched land. Selah
zh: 我向你伸出雙手， 我的心渴想你，好像乾旱的地盼望雨水一樣。

en: Answer me quickly, O LORD! My spirit fails! Hide not your face from me, lest I be like those who go down to the pit.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你快快應允我， 我的心靈已經衰竭， 求你不要向我掩面， 免得我像那些下坑的人一樣。

en: Let me hear in the morning of your steadfast love, for in you I trust. Make me know the way I should go, for to you I lift up my soul.
zh: 求你使我清晨得聞你的慈愛， 因為我倚靠你。 求你指示我當走的路， 因為我的心仰望你。

en: Deliver me from my enemies, O LORD! I have fled to you for refuge!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你救我脫離我的仇敵， 我往你那裡藏身。

en: Teach me to do your will, for you are my God! Let your good Spirit lead me on level ground!
zh: 求你教我遵行你的旨意， 因為你是我的 神； 願你至善的靈引導我到平坦的地。

en: For your name's sake, O LORD, preserve my life! In your righteousness bring my soul out of trouble!
zh: 耶和華啊！求你為你名的緣故使我存活， 按著你的公義把我從患難中領出來。

en: And in your steadfast love you will cut off my enemies, and you will destroy all the adversaries of my soul, for I am your servant.
zh: 求你因你的慈愛使我的仇敵滅絕， 求你消滅所有苦害我的人， 因為我是你的僕人。
